title: BEM-914 worker request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM914_SYSTEM_IMPROVEMENT_PROTOCOL_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-914 SYSTEM IMPROVEMENT PROTOCOL REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: agree a system improvement protocol after Claude external audit and BEM-907..BEM-913 remediation.
Base:
- Protocol v1.7 accepted roadmap.
- Claude external audit: CONDITIONAL PASS with critical findings.
- BEM-907..BEM-913 remediation: REMEDIATION_PARTIAL_PASS.
Required protocol goal:
- Turn deterministic baseline into more real operational system.
- Prioritize closing remaining gaps honestly.
Must include phases:
1. Proof hardening: require CI/Git proof, fix commit_sha null evidence path, define release PASS conditions.
2. Dispatch runtime hardening: improve dispatch consumer, no schedule trigger without operator, workflow_dispatch first, queued reconciliation.
3. Object execution hardening: GD/DIR/WRK prompts, deterministic runners, then optional LLM-agent runtime only after operator-approved execution model.
4. Channel and event log hardening: consumer, message schema, event log completeness, rotation policy.
5. Architecture canon and plan/fact/gap maintenance.
6. Product pilot gate: prepare everything autonomously; operator selects real client/segment/objective/metrics.
7. Re-audit package for Claude.
Worker must assess:
- Is this protocol executable without violating rules?
- What can be done autonomously?
- What requires operator gate?
- What status should be recommended?
Return status APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
